obligations.regulation: SEBI Circular on Intraday borrowing facility availed by mutual funds
obligations.action: Ensure intraday borrowings are availed only for the permitted purposes: unitholder pay-outs (redemptions, IDCW, interest), investment pay-ins, MTM obligations, foreign exchange settlements, and repayment of existing borrowings.
obligations.evidence: Borrowing transaction logs and deal tickets specifying the purpose of borrowing

obligations.regulation: SEBI Circular on Intraday borrowing facility availed by mutual funds
obligations.action: Limit the quantum of intraday borrowings to guaranteed receivables, sighted non-guaranteed receivables to be received by end of day, and additional borrowings solely for meeting redemption and other unitholder pay-outs under Regulation 42(1).
obligations.evidence: Daily borrowing limit utilization reports and receivable tracking sheets

obligations.regulation: SEBI Circular on Intraday borrowing facility availed by mutual funds
obligations.action: Ensure all intraday borrowings are repaid by the end of the day, and any conversions to overnight borrowings are within regulatory limits and for purposes allowed under Regulation 42(1).
obligations.evidence: End-of-day bank account statements, repayment logs, and overnight borrowing compliance reports

obligations.regulation: SEBI Circular on Intraday borrowing facility availed by mutual funds
obligations.action: Formulate and obtain approval from the Boards of AMC and Trustees for the policy on the use of intraday borrowing facility, incorporating approval processes and monitoring mechanisms.
obligations.evidence: Board and Trustee meeting minutes, and the approved Intraday Borrowing Policy document

obligations.regulation: SEBI Circular on Intraday borrowing facility availed by mutual funds
obligations.action: Publish the approved intraday borrowing policy on the website of the AMC.
obligations.evidence: Website screenshot and active URL of the published policy

obligations.regulation: SEBI Circular on Intraday borrowing facility availed by mutual funds
obligations.action: Maintain scheme-wise records detailing the underlying liquidity mismatch and the expected source of repayment for each intraday borrowing.
obligations.evidence: Scheme-wise intraday borrowing register detailing liquidity mismatch and repayment sources

obligations.regulation: SEBI Circular on Intraday borrowing facility availed by mutual funds
obligations.action: Ensure compliance with clauses 6 and 7 of the Fourth Schedule of SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 2026, and para 17.7 of the Master Circular.
obligations.evidence: Compliance certificates and internal audit reports

obligations.regulation: SEBI Circular on Intraday borrowing facility availed by mutual funds
obligations.action: Ensure that the cost of intraday borrowing, as well as any loss or cost incurred due to unforeseen events or delays in receiving funds from receivables, is borne solely by the AMC and not charged to the schemes.
obligations.evidence: Scheme expense ledgers, AMC financial statements, and billing records
